description: DexScreener market data over x402: search trading pairs, read live price, liquidity and volume, and surface newly launched and trending tokens across major chains. Built for agents tracking new pools, momentum and meme launches. Data by DexScreener.

endpoints.description: All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}
zh-CN.title: All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}
endpoints.title: All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs all DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses through the dexscreener-dex-data-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.title: Search pairs by token name/symbol/address

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/token-profiles/latest/v1`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。

zh-CN.title: Latest token profiles (new-launch / discovery radar)

endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs latest token profiles (new-launch / discovery radar) through the dexscreener-dex-data-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.description: 通过 x402 网关获取 DexScreener 行情:搜索交易对、读取实时价格/流动性/成交量,并发现新上线与热门代币。适合 Agent 追踪新盘、动量与 meme 上新。数据来自 DexScreener。
zh-CN.subtitle: 跨主流链的实时 DEX 交易对、价格、流动性与新上线代币。
zh-CN.title: DexScreener
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

sub_title: Real-time DEX pairs, prices, liquidity and newly launched tokens across major chains.
subtitle: Real-time DEX pairs, prices, liquidity and newly launched tokens across major chains.
title: DexScreener
use_case: Use to look up a token's DEX pairs/price/liquidity, search tokens, or pull the latest token profiles for new-launch / meme screening.
